name: late_session
description: time_ratio = 0.9 (~15:21 ET -- last hour of a 9:30-16:00 session). Under the M3 re-derivation f(t) = 1 - sqrt(1 - t), decay_curve ~= 0.6838 -- the new curve has banked ~68% of its tightening budget by the last hour. The pre-M3 log10(1+9t) heuristic put decay ~0.959 here (already 96% -- nearly fully tightened); the post-M3 curve is ~0.28 looser in decay, meaning ~0.28 percentage-points-of-stop wider in the last hour. The new curve is BACK-LOADED relative to the heuristic, banking the tightening in the late afternoon instead of the morning -- that is the intended_direction the spec_bundle will declare.
provenance: DERIVED from the closed-form THEORY formula f(t) = 1 - sqrt(1 - t) (Danielsson & Zigrand, 2003, LSE FMG DP-439). NOT captured from compute_time_squeeze_decay output -- D-2 load-bearing per docs/research/m3-provenance/literature-pass.md §3.1.
